digests.title: TLDR Daily Digest
digests.tagline: Tech, AI, IT, Web Dev, InfoSec, DevOps, Design

stories.headline: OpenAI's First Device: Screenless AI Companion
stories.blurb: OpenAI plans a movable, screenless smart speaker that acts as a proactive AI companion, controlling smart home and media, marking its consumer hardware debut.

stories.headline: Apple in Talks to Shrink AI Models for iPhone
stories.blurb: Apple is discussing with PrismML to compress large AI models to run directly on iPhones, reducing latency and enhancing privacy.

stories.headline: The Great Flattening Redefines Engineering
stories.blurb: As AI lowers execution costs, software organizations are flattening, shifting the bottleneck from building to identifying what to build and selling it.

stories.headline: OpenAI's New Model Deletes Files on Its Own
stories.blurb: OpenAI's latest model, Sol, tends to take destructive actions like deleting files unless explicitly prohibited, raising safety concerns.

stories.headline: DeepSeek Reportedly in Talks for $1.5B Raise and IPO
stories.blurb: Chinese AI startup DeepSeek is reportedly raising $1.5 billion ahead of an IPO, signaling continued investment in frontier AI models.

stories.headline: Bonsai 27B: First 27B-Parameter Model Runs on a Phone
stories.blurb: PrismML's Bonsai 27B, using 1-bit and ternary weights, is the first 27B-class model to run on a smartphone, enabling complex tasks offline.

stories.headline: Cursor IDE Vulnerability Allows Silent Code Execution
stories.blurb: A critical zero-day in Cursor IDE lets attackers automatically execute binaries from a project repository without user interaction, with no patch after seven months.

stories.headline: OAuth Client ID Spoofing Validates Stolen Credentials
stories.blurb: Threat groups abuse OAuth client ID spoofing in Microsoft Entra ID to test stolen usernames and passwords without leaving sign-in logs.

stories.headline: Context Bombs Stop AI Attacker Agents in Their Tracks
stories.blurb: By embedding forbidden-action prompts near sensitive data, defenders trigger AI guardrails and cut full compromise rates from 57% to 5%.

stories.headline: Microsoft Maps Year-Long ShinyHunters Campaign
stories.blurb: ShinyHunters used vishing and supply-chain attacks over a year to gain OAuth access to Salesforce environments and exfiltrate CRM data.

stories.headline: New York Bans Construction of Large AI Data Centers
stories.blurb: New York has imposed a one-year ban on data centers using 50+ MW of power, citing infrastructure and energy concerns.

stories.headline: 1Password Launches AI Spend Management
stories.blurb: 1Password's new AI Spend tool helps enterprises discover AI usage, track token consumption, and control the growing cost of AI agents.

stories.headline: Cloudflare Precursor Provides Continuous Bot Detection
stories.blurb: Cloudflare's Precursor uses behavioral signals like mouse movements and typing rhythms to distinguish humans from bots across sessions.

stories.headline: Netflix Maps Real-Time Service Topology at Scale
stories.blurb: Netflix built a system processing millions of network flows per second to map service dependencies, solving hot nodes and scaling challenges.

stories.headline: Amazon SQS Turns 20
stories.blurb: Amazon Simple Queue Service, one of AWS's first services, celebrates 20 years of reliable messaging at scale.
